title: Pick a Side
narrative: New strategy! Pick a PIVOT crate, and everything else automatically sorts to its left (smaller) or right (larger). The pivot lands in its perfect position. Way fewer comparisons!

levels.name: Left or Right?
levels.hint: Click any crate to make it the pivot. Everything smaller goes left, larger goes right. The pivot ends up in its final spot!

levels.name: Do It Again
levels.hint: After the first partition, each half needs its own pivot. Keep picking until everything's placed!

levels.name: Bad Pivot!
levels.hint: These crates are already in order. What happens if you pick the first one as pivot? Try it... then try picking the MIDDLE one instead.

levels.name: The Showdown
levels.hint: 12 crates! Remember how many comparisons 'Neighbors Only' would take? Watch how much faster pivoting is.
